project.name: HotelBooking
project.description: The Hotel Booking System is an online platform designed to enable users to search, browse, and book hotels efficiently. It provides a seamless experience for both customers and hotel administrators, allowing easy management of hotels, rooms, bookings, and reviews. Entities & Key Features: User Stores personal and account information: name, email, phone, password, role, address, and profile details. Users can manage their bookings, track payment status, and leave reviews for hotels. Hotel Contains hotel details: name, description, contact info, address, rating, total rooms, and check-in/out times. Administrators can manage hotel listings and update information. Room Represents individual rooms in a hotel with details like room type, price, capacity, bed type, availability, and description. Rooms are linked to hotels and are booked by users. Booking Tracks hotel reservations with details such as user, room, check-in/check-out dates, number of guests, total price, booking status, and payment status. Allows users to manage reservations and special requests. Review Stores user ratings and comments for hotels. Helps other users make informed booking decisions. Relationships: User ↔ Booking: One user can have multiple bookings. Room ↔ Booking: A room can be booked multiple times over different dates. Hotel ↔ Room: One hotel has multiple rooms. User ↔ Review: One user can leave multiple reviews. Hotel ↔ Review: One hotel can receive multiple reviews. Technical Overview: Backend: Java/Spring Boot with JPA/Hibernate Database: MySQL / PostgreSQL Designed for scalability, maintainability, and clear entity relationships.
